FAILURE_COPYBACK_REJECTS_REAL_PACKET: execute_live creates the absent output root before authorization checks
seal_failure_evidence removes the ownership marker before manifesting copy-back files
FEATURE_PROCESS_NOT_DENIED_PRIVATE_ACCES: receiver feature subprocess runs from a mode-0700 isolated input directory
receiver feature inputs are copied public-only files
receiver feature output uses a separate directory and denies private/source-receipt path names
PMU_PREFLIGHT_ACCEPTS_ZERO_CYCLES: runtime measure_store_window fails when cycles are zero
SUCCESS_DIGEST_BINDINGS_ARE_STALE: final target result no longer embeds self-referential execution/copyback manifest digests
success execution manifest is emitted after final result is stable
copyback manifest is emitted last and independently verified by the controller
V3_CARRIER_NOT_EXACTLY_INHERITED: runtime materializes A/B using the V3 pattern_byte(index) = (index * 131 + 17) & 0xff
runtime uses segmented V3 sentinel PMU windows over starts 0, 1024, 2048, and 3072
runtime keeps affine line(i) = (257*i + 43) mod 4096 for baseline, source work, sentinels, and restoration
